name: English Muffins in a Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure flour by spooning lightly into a cup.
2. Combine three cups flour, yeast, sugar, salt, and baking soda.
3. Heat milk and water to 120-130 degrees F.
4. Add the heated milk and water to the dry mixture; beat well.
5. Stir in enough more flour to make a very stiff batter.
6. Spoon the batter into two greased and cornmeal-sprinkled loaf pans.
7. Let rise for 45 minutes.
8. Bake at 400 degrees F for 25 minutes.
9. Remove from pans immediately and let cool.
